title: symphyotrichum lateriflorum var. hirsuticaule
intro: Symphyotrichum lateriflorum var. hirsuticaule, also known as hairy skeleton flower, is a variety of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The hairy skeleton flower has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, and is also believed to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Symphyotrichum lateriflorum var. hirsuticaule include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
